corpus_note: Full corpus rebuilt from the source PDF visual layout. Fragments sharing a printed baseline are merged left-to-right. New readable paragraphs are created only where the next source line starts at its true column margin with a genuinely upper-case first alphabetic character and the previous visual line ends a sentence; known dotted abbreviations are vetoed. Vertical spacing alone never splits prose; wrapped fully-bold headings and bold/italic labels remain in one label run.

alias_matching_notes.normalization: diacritic-insensitive; punctuation separators + / and plain spaces normalized equivalently
alias_matching_notes.unsafe_legacy_aliases_removed: standalone salts, routes and cross-drug aliases are removed
alias_matching_notes.combination_priority: handled by HTML resolver using full combination aliases before individual monographs

hdsd_route_matching.strategy: active-ingredient match first; dosage-form/route compatibility decides between monographs that share the same active ingredient but differ by use route
hdsd_route_matching.safe_ambiguity: when dosage form does not distinguish route-specific monographs, show the user a contextual chooser instead of guessing
